subcodes.first_line: Glorified art Thou, O my God! Thou knowest that Bahá hath desired naught in this Cause save the exaltation of Thy Word and Thy good-pleasure [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تعلم بان البهاء مااراد فی امر الا اعلاء کلمتک و رضائک و ماقصد
subcodes.subjects: @Manifestation of God speaking in the voice of Divinity, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
